block_02: We would like to inform you that January 16, 2023, Martin Luther King Day, is a public holiday in the United States. Due to the holiday, IQOption’s trading schedule will be subject to changes.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are highlighted below. Trading hours are in UTC.
block_07: Silver, Gold, WTI, Brent, NGas, Copper
block_17: Please note, that some of the assets mentioned above are available for trading only on the margin engine.
block_18: Note: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over-the-Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
block_19: Note: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions. All-or-Nothing and Digital Options are only available to Professional Clients
